aboutSection.title: Who we are
aboutSection.text: Marián s.r.o. – a family company that has specialized in premium woodcarving and woodworking tools since 2013. We only stock internationally recognized, proven brands – Arbortech shaping tools from Australia, Saburrtooth rasps from the USA, Manpa milling tools from Korea, and Kirjes sanding systems from Sweden.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Reviews from satisfied customers.
testimonials.sourceNote: Reviews come from customers verified through the Heureka Verified by Customers service.

review1.name: Peter Novák
review1.text: We've been working with Maroško for years. They always have stock available and help us choose the right tools.

review2.name: Jana Kováčová
review2.text: Friendly service and quality tools at fair prices. My order arrived at home the very next day.

review3.name: Milan Horváth
review3.text: We use Maroško's milling discs every day - they last long and offer consistent quality.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to our customers' most common questions.

q1.question: How quickly do you deliver ordered tools?
q1.answer: In-stock items are shipped within 24 hours, courier delivery usually takes 1-2 business days.

q2.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q2.answer: We accept cash on delivery, card payment (Visa/Mastercard), bank transfer via QR code, or Sporopay for Slovenská sporiteľňa clients.

q3.question: Can I pick up the tools in person?
q3.answer: Yes, we're happy to hand over your tools in person – just arrange a pickup time with us at our company headquarters in Vrádište.

q4.question: Do you provide a warranty and service for the tools you sell?
q4.answer: We provide a statutory warranty on all goods and arrange post-warranty service if needed.

contactCta.title: Have a question about a specific item?
contactCta.subtitle: Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactCta.note: Sending the message opens your email client with a pre-filled message to eshop.marosko@gmail.com.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Marián s.r.o. is a family business that has been selling premium imported woodcarving and woodworking tools in Slovakia since 2013. Our goal is to bring tools to market that you simply can't find in regular stores – tools that save carvers and DIY enthusiasts both time and money.
about.history: Our roots go back to 2011, when the Vercajch.eu project was founded; we took over all its rights in 2018. Today we run the shop under the eshop.marosko.sk brand, where in-stock items ship within 24 hours.
about.brands: We only stock proven international brands: Arbortech shaping and planing tools from Australia, Saburrtooth tungsten-carbide rasps from the USA, Manpa extension arms and milling attachments from Korea, ARTU Tools carbide-tipped drill bits from Germany, and Diaclear diamond-coated sharpening discs from the Czech Republic. Our range is rounded out with shellac, wood finishing waxes and certified protective work equipment.
about.philosophy: We personally put every tool we sell to the test before adding it to our range. Thanks to years of hands-on carving experience, we can judge not just its strengths but also its shortcomings – so we can give our customers genuinely honest, expert advice.
about.support: As a Slovak seller, we offer a full warranty, quality after-warranty service, and an invoice you can claim as an expense under industry subsidy schemes. We're proud to support Slovak artists and schools by making tools available that weren't previously accessible.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Browse samples of the tools we carry.

milling.title: Milling discs for angle grinders
milling.short: The legendary Arbortech and Piranha/Prano discs, plus the full Manpa lineup, all in one place.
milling.description: Milling discs are the heart of every carving workshop. Our range includes the legendary Arbortech Industrial Woodcarver – the original Australian disc that kicked off the angle-grinder wood-shaping revolution – along with 3-wing Piranha/Prano discs for fast, controlled shaping. A wide selection of Manpa milling discs, from compact 70 mm models to professional discs with replaceable carbide blades, lets you pick exactly the size and cutting depth your project needs. Replaceable blades also save money, since a dull blade can simply be swapped instead of replacing the whole disc. Every disc fits standard angle grinders and is trusted by professional carvers worldwide.
milling.img1: Arbortech Industrial Woodcarver – the original wood-shaping disc with clamping key

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: News, tips and tool spotlights from our e-shop eshop.marosko.sk.
blog.intro: On this blog you'll find practical tips, how-tos and spotlights on new arrivals from our range of woodcarving and woodworking tools. Every article links straight through to the original post on eshop.marosko.sk, where you can also buy the product directly.

saburrtoothRasple.title: Saburrtooth USA Shank Burrs – a Guide to Shapes and Grits
saburrtoothRasple.description: An overview of the American Saburrtooth shank burrs – shapes, color-coded grits, and practical uses for carvers, sculptors, and modelers.

manpaOci.title: Manpa Eye-Shaping Burrs – Set of 8
manpaOci.description: A set of 8 tools for shaping and fine-burning eyes, scales, and decorative rings on wooden figures – no more tedious hand-carving.

manpaEzSander.title: Manpa EZ Sander 65 mm – Flap Sanding Wheel
manpaEzSander.description: A flexible sanding attachment for smoothing uneven surfaces, hollows, and rounded shapes – it flexes to match the workpiece.

dlataZaciatocnik.title: Choosing Chisels for Beginners (M-stein)
dlataZaciatocnik.description: A set of hand chisels optimized for smaller projects and beginner carvers, from a Slovak manufacturer.

stubaiSada.title: Stubai – 4-Piece Beginner Chisel Set
stubaiSada.description: A high-quality 4-piece Austrian chisel set suited for figures, relief carving, or hobby carving, in a practical roll-up pouch.

arbortechMiniGrinder.title: Arbortech Mini Grinder MG1000 – Cordless Set
arbortechMiniGrinder.description: A cordless carving tool with a brushless motor for detailed woodwork, part of the "Woodworking Pack" set.

arbortechMiniCarver.title: Arbortech Mini Carver 1000W – Electric Carver
arbortechMiniCarver.description: A powerful electric carving tool with 6-speed control (6,000–18,000 rpm), the successor to the Mini Grinder, with dust extraction and low vibration.

arbortechWoodcarverProfi.title: Arbortech Woodcarver PROFI-INDUSTRIAL Carving Disc
arbortechWoodcarverProfi.description: A carbide disc with replaceable rotating teeth and 25× longer lifespan, suited for hard and soft wood, laminate, and plastics.

arbortechContourSander.title: Arbortech Contour Random Sander
arbortechContourSander.description: A random-orbital sander developed specifically for sanding irregular shapes and curves – the rotating and vibrating motion complement each other so the grit never passes over the same spot twice. The proven Contour Sander got an upgrade: fiber discs mounted with a center screw replaced the original cloth sanding sleeves.

arbortechTurboScraper.title: Arbortech Turbo Scraper 100 mm
arbortechTurboScraper.description: The specially designed disc cuts at a negative angle and glides smoothly across the wood – minimizing tear-out and delivering clean results even on demanding projects. Rather than removing material, it smooths the surface much like a glass scraper; the teeth can be rotated once dull, giving the tool an exceptionally long lifespan.

arbortechSpheroplane.title: Arbortech SpheroPlane
arbortechSpheroplane.description: Shape a wooden bowl or sphere without a lathe – SpheroPlane attaches to your angle grinder and has an adjustable cutting radius for both small and large projects. It comes with a sanding system for finishing the surface, and works with any standard 115/125 mm angle grinder as well as the Arbortech Power Carving Unit.

arbortechTurboPlane.title: Arbortech Turbo Plane
arbortechTurboPlane.description: A revolutionary tool that combines a plane, router, and sander in one compact device for cutting, shaping, and finishing wood. Adjustable angle and cutting depth allow precise work, while a protective guard and anti-kickback system keep it safe to use.

suchyZips.title: Hook-and-Loop Backing Pads – Made to Order
suchyZips.description: A clean, reusable way to attach sanding discs – both the hook and adhesive sides cut to your exact diameter.

silverlineLesticka.title: Silverline Polisher, 180 mm, 1200 W
silverlineLesticka.description: A powerful polisher with a 180 mm pad and variable speed control (600–3500 rpm), suited for polishing and sanding metal, wood, and lacquered surfaces.

arbortechPowerChisel.title: Arbortech Power Chisel – Electric Chisel, 7-Piece Set
arbortechPowerChisel.description: A new-generation electric chisel combining the power of an electric drive with the finesse of hand woodcarving. A 7-piece set with quick blade changes, suited for detail carving and heavier stock removal alike.

shops.title: Our Shops
shops.subtitle: Three e-shops, one goal – quality woodcarving and woodworking tools for every customer.

marosko.name: eshop.marosko.sk
marosko.description: Our main and largest shop, where most of our customers order. You'll find our complete range here – woodcarving and woodworking tools, milling discs, hand and power tools, and all the accessories in one place.

vercajch.name: Vercajch.eu
vercajch.description: A project that started back in 2011. We took over all its rights in 2018, and it's been part of our family of shops ever since.

rezbarskeNaradie.name: RezbárskeNáradie.sk
rezbarskeNaradie.description: Our newest project, created to make it easier for customers to find their way around. While eshop.marosko.sk is a general tool shop, RezbárskeNáradie.sk focuses purely on woodcarving tools – so it's easier to find and easier to remember.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy | Marián s.r.o.
gdpr.description: Information about personal data processing and cookie usage on the Marián s.r.o. website.

banner.text: This site uses cookies to provide basic functionality, and with your consent also for analytics and displaying embedded content. You can change your choice at any time in the site footer.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: Required for the site's basic functionality. Cannot be turned off.

analytics.title: Performance / analytics
analytics.description: Help us understand how you use the site (Google Analytics).

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Enable embedded content, e.g. maps or videos.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy
gdpr.intro: This document explains what personal data we process, for what purpose, for how long, and what rights you have in connection with it.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.text: The controller of this website and of the personal data processed on it is Marián s.r.o., registered at Vrádište 138, 908 49 Vrádište, Slovak Republic, Company ID (IČO): 47546298, Tax ID (DIČ): 2023992916. For any questions about the processing of personal data, please contact us at eshop.marosko@gmail.com.

purposes.title: What data we process and why
purposes.text:
If you contact us through the contact form on the site, we process the data you provide yourself – name, email, phone number, and the content of your message. We process this data to handle your inquiry, based on our legitimate interest in responding to visitor inquiries, or based on steps taken toward entering into a contract (Article 6(1)(b) and (f) GDPR).

If you consent to analytics cookies in the cookie banner, we also process data about your behavior on the site through Google Analytics, solely on the basis of your consent (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR), which you may withdraw at any time.

retention.title: Data retention period
retention.text: We keep contact-form data only for as long as necessary to handle your inquiry and a reasonable period afterward in case of follow-up communication, but no longer than 12 months from the last exchange, unless a specific legal requirement (e.g. accounting or tax law) requires a longer retention period. Data processed on the basis of consent (analytics) is retained for as long as that consent remains valid.

recipients.title: Recipients of personal data
recipients.text: Your personal data may be shared with the following recipients who provide us with technical services: Vercel Inc. (website hosting and operation) and Google LLC (Google Analytics – only if you consent to analytics cookies). We do not share your data with other third parties for marketing purposes.

transfers.title: International data transfers
transfers.text: Our service providers (Vercel, Google) may process data on servers located outside the European Union/EEA. In such cases, the transfer is protected by appropriate safeguards under GDPR, in particular the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission under Article 46 GDPR.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: In connection with the processing of your personal data, you have the right to access your data, request its correction or erasure, restrict its processing, request data portability, and object to processing. Where processing is based on consent, you have the right to withdraw that consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal. You can exercise your rights by emailing eshop.marosko@gmail.com.

complaint.title: Right to lodge a complaint
complaint.text: If you believe that the processing of your personal data violates GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority – for the Slovak Republic, this is the Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic, Hraničná 12, 820 07 Bratislava 27, https://dataprotection.gov.sk.

cookiesTech.title: Cookies used on this site
cookiesTech.text: This site uses three categories of cookies: necessary (required for basic site functionality, cannot be disabled), performance/analytics (Google Analytics – only with consent), and preference cookies (display of embedded content such as maps or videos – only with consent). You can change your choice at any time using the "Cookie settings" link in the site footer.
